Alias.name: yhelp
Alias.script: cecho("<cadet_blue>[MagiDevtools]<reset> yreset | ydry [on|off|toggle] | ylane <eq|bal|ent> [on|off|toggle] | ylanes | ystage <lane> <cmd> | ycommit [eq|bal|class] | yclear [lane] | ymode <paired|as_available> | yprefer <eq|bal> | yack [sent|fail|cooldown] | ytest snap|sens|instill AFF|ent CMD|bloodboil snap|fire|debug|auto|off | ra status [target] | yrdebug [on|off] <aff|dam|par|focus> | yrshow [aff|dam|par|focus] [full]\n")

Alias.name: ra status
Alias.script: if Yso and Yso.devtools and type(Yso.devtools.ra_status)=="function" then Yso.devtools.ra_status(matches[2]) end

Alias.name: ytest
Alias.script: local args = matches[2] or "" if Yso and Yso.devtools and Yso.devtools.test and type(Yso.devtools.test.run) == "function" then Yso.devtools.test.run(args) else print("[MagiDevtools] ytest harness not loaded.") end

Alias.name: yreset
Alias.script: if Yso and Yso.devtools and type(Yso.devtools.reset)=="function" then Yso.devtools.reset() end

Alias.name: ydry
Alias.script: if not (Yso and Yso.devtools and type(Yso.devtools.set_dry)=="function") then return end local tok = matches[2] local cur = (Yso.net and Yso.net.cfg and Yso.net.cfg.dry_run == true) tok = tostring(tok or ""):lower() if tok == "" or tok == "toggle" then Yso.devtools.set_dry(not cur) elseif tok == "on" or tok == "1" or tok == "true" then Yso.devtools.set_dry(true) elseif tok == "off" or tok == "0" or tok == "false" then Yso.devtools.set_dry(false) end Yso.devtools.status()

Alias.name: ylane
Alias.script: if not (Yso and Yso.devtools and type(Yso.devtools.lane)=="function") then return end Yso.devtools.lane(matches[2], matches[3]) Yso.devtools.status()

Alias.name: ylanes
Alias.script: if Yso and Yso.devtools and type(Yso.devtools.status)=="function" then Yso.devtools.status() end

Alias.name: ystage
Alias.script: if not (Yso and Yso.devtools and type(Yso.devtools.stage)=="function") then return end Yso.devtools.stage(matches[2], matches[3]) Yso.devtools.status()

Alias.name: ycommit
Alias.script: if not (Yso and Yso.devtools and type(Yso.devtools.commit)=="function") then return end Yso.devtools.commit(matches[2]) Yso.devtools.status()

Alias.name: yclear
Alias.script: if not (Yso and Yso.devtools and type(Yso.devtools.clear)=="function") then return end Yso.devtools.clear(matches[2]) Yso.devtools.status()

Alias.name: ymode
Alias.script: if not (Yso and Yso.devtools and type(Yso.devtools.set_mode)=="function") then return end Yso.devtools.set_mode(matches[2]) Yso.devtools.status()

Alias.name: yprefer
Alias.script: if not (Yso and Yso.devtools and type(Yso.devtools.set_prefer)=="function") then return end Yso.devtools.set_prefer(matches[2]) Yso.devtools.status()

Alias.name: yack
Alias.script: if not (Yso and Yso.devtools and type(Yso.devtools.ack)=="function") then return end Yso.devtools.ack(matches[2]) Yso.devtools.status()

Alias.name: Reload
Alias.script: cecho("<cadet_blue>[MagiDevtools]<reset> yreload -> yreset (lane lab)\n") if Yso and Yso.devtools and type(Yso.devtools.reset)=="function" then Yso.devtools.reset() end

Alias.name: Emergency halt
Alias.script: if Yso and Yso.off and Yso.off.oc and type(Yso.off.oc.off) == "function" then Yso.off.oc.off() elseif Yso and Yso.off and Yso.off.oc then Yso.off.oc.enabled = false end; if Yso and Yso.pulse and type(Yso.pulse.enable) == "function" then pcall(Yso.pulse.enable, "off.oc", false) end; cecho("<red>[Yso] offense off\n")

Alias.name: Target+automation
Alias.script:
local tgt = matches[2] if not tgt or tgt == "" then return end
-- set target (handles both common APIs) if Yso and Yso.targeting then if type(Yso.targeting.set) == "function" then Yso.targeting.set(tgt) elseif type(Yso.targeting.set_target) == "function" then Yso.targeting.set_target(tgt) else Yso.targeting.target = tgt end end
-- enable occultist offense if Yso and Yso.off and Yso.off.oc then if type(Yso.off.oc.on) == "function" then Yso.off.oc.on() else Yso.off.oc.enabled = true end end
-- quick status line local oc = (Yso and Yso.off and Yso.off.oc and Yso.off.oc.enabled) and "ON" or "OFF" cecho(string.format("<red>[Yso] <white>Target: %s <red>Occultist offense: %s\n", tgt, oc))

Alias.name: yrdebug
Alias.script: local RD = Yso and Yso.devtools and Yso.devtools.route_debug if not RD then cecho("<red>[MagiDevtools] route_debug not loaded\n"); return end local args = matches[2] or "" local toks = {} for w in args:gmatch("%S+") do toks[#toks+1] = w:lower() end if #toks == 0 then cecho("<CadetBlue>[MagiDevtools]<reset> yrdebug [on|off] <aff|dam|par|focus>\n") elseif #toks == 1 then RD.debug_toggle(toks[1]) else RD.debug_toggle(toks[2], toks[1]) end

Alias.name: yrshow
Alias.script: local RD = Yso and Yso.devtools and Yso.devtools.route_debug if not RD then cecho("<red>[MagiDevtools] route_debug not loaded\n"); return end RD.show(matches[2] or "")

Script.name: MagiDevtools: Lane Lab
Script.script:
--========================================================-- -- MagiDevtools: Lane Lab (offline lane testing) -- • Safe offline harness for payload / lane logic. -- • Provides dry-run emission via Yso.net.cfg.dry_run. -- -- Commands (aliases in this package): -- yreset : enable DRY, set EQ/BAL/ENT ready, clear staging -- ydry [on|off|toggle] : toggle dry-run -- ylane <eq|bal|ent> [on|off|toggle] -- ylanes : show lane + staging status -- ystage <lane> <cmd> : stage command into lane (eq/bal/class/free) -- ycommit [eq|bal|class] : commit staged payload (optional lane isolation) -- yclear [lane] : clear staged lane(s) -- ymode <paired|as_available> -- yprefer <eq|bal> -- yack <sent|fail|cooldown> : simulate entity ack outcomes --========================================================--
Yso = Yso or {} Yso.devtools = Yso.devtools or {} local D = Yso.devtools
D.cfg = D.cfg or {} D.cfg.echo = (D.cfg.echo ~= false) D.cfg.auto_dry = false
local function _nl() return string.char(10) end local function _ce(s) if type(cecho) == "function" then cecho(tostring(s).._nl()) end end local function _trim(s) s = tostring(s or "") s = s:gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") return s end local function _lane_key(lane) lane = _trim(lane):lower() if lane == "entity" or lane == "ent" then return "class" end return lane end
local function _boolish(tok) tok = _trim(tok):lower() if tok == "" then return nil end if tok == "on" or tok == "1" or tok == "true" or tok == "ready" then return true end if tok == "off" or tok == "0" or tok == "false" or tok == "down" then return false end if tok == "toggle" then return "toggle" end return nil end
local function _now_s() if Yso and Yso.util and type(Yso.util.now) == "function" then local ok, v = pcall(Yso.util.now) if ok and tonumber(v) then return tonumber(v) end end if type(getEpoch) == "function" then local ok, v = pcall(getEpoch) v = ok and tonumber(v) or nil if v then if v > 100000000000 then v = v / 1000 end return v end end return os.time() end
local function _fmt_bool(v) if v == true then return "yes" end if v == false then return "no" end return "?" end
local function _fmt_pct(v) v = tonumber(v) if not v then return "?" end return string.format("%d%%", math.floor(v + 0.5)) end
local function _fmt_secs(v) v = tonumber(v) if not v then return "?" end if v < 0 then v = 0 end return string.format("%.1fs", v) end
local function _fmt_list(list) if type(list) ~= "table" or #list == 0 then return "-" end local out = {} for i = 1, #list do local item = _trim(list[i]) if item ~= "" then out[#out + 1] = item end end if #out == 0 then return "-" end return table.concat(out, ", ") end
local function _ra_target(arg) local tgt = _trim(arg) if tgt ~= "" then return tgt end
if Yso and type(Yso.get_target) == "function" then local ok, v = pcall(Yso.get_target) v = ok and _trim(v) or "" if v ~= "" then return v end end
local txn = Yso and Yso.occ and Yso.occ._aura_txn or nil if type(txn) == "table" then local v = _trim(txn.target) if v ~= "" then return v end end
return "" end
local function _ra_snapshot(tgt) tgt = _trim(tgt) if tgt == "" then return nil end
if Yso and Yso.off and Yso.off.oc and Yso.off.oc.cleanseaura and type(Yso.off.oc.cleanseaura.snapshot) == "function" then local ok, row = pcall(Yso.off.oc.cleanseaura.snapshot, tgt) if ok and type(row) == "table" then return row end end
if Yso and Yso.occ and type(Yso.occ.aura) == "table" then local a = Yso.occ.aura[tgt] or Yso.occ.aura[tgt:lower()] if type(a) == "table" then return a end end
return nil end
local function _ra_plan(tgt) tgt = _trim(tgt) if tgt == "" then return nil end if not (Yso and Yso.off and Yso.off.oc and Yso.off.oc.cleanseaura and type(Yso.off.oc.cleanseaura.plan_aff) == "function") then return nil end local ok, row = pcall(Yso.off.oc.cleanseaura.plan_aff, tgt) if ok and type(row) == "table" then return row end return nil end
function D.ra_status(arg) local tgt = _ra_target(arg) local ready = nil if Yso and Yso.occ and type(Yso.occ.readaura_is_ready) == "function" then local ok, v = pcall(Yso.occ.readaura_is_ready) if ok then ready = (v == true) end end
local reason = _trim(Yso and Yso.occ and Yso.occ._ra and Yso.occ._ra.reason or "") local txn = { active = false, status = "", window_remaining = 0, read_id = 0 } if Yso and Yso.occ and type(Yso.occ.aura_txn_status) == "function" then local ok, row = pcall(Yso.occ.aura_txn_status, tgt) if ok and type(row) == "table" then txn = row end end
local snap = _ra_snapshot(tgt) local plan = _ra_plan(tgt) local label = (tgt ~= "" and tgt) or "(none)" local ready_suffix = (reason ~= "" and (" reason=" .. reason)) or "" _ce(string.format("<cadet_blue>[RA]<reset> target=%s ready=%s%s", label, _fmt_bool(ready), ready_suffix))
if type(snap) ~= "table" then _ce(string.format("<dim_grey>[RA] snapshot=missing txn=%s active=%s window=%s<reset>", tostring(txn.status or ""), _fmt_bool(txn.active), _fmt_secs(txn.window_remaining) )) return false end
local age = nil if tonumber(snap.ts) then age = _now_s() - tonumber(snap.ts) end
local counts_left = (snap.physical ~= nil) and tostring(snap.physical) or "?" local counts_right = (snap.mental ~= nil) and tostring(snap.mental) or "?" local mana_pct = (snap.had_mana == true) and _fmt_pct(snap.mana_pct) or "?" local parse_open = (snap.parse_window_open == true) local confidence = _trim(snap.confidence_state) if confidence == "" then confidence = "missing" end local score = tonumber(snap.confidence_score) local score_text = score and string.format("%.2f", score) or "?"
_ce(string.format("<dim_grey>[RA] snapshot=%s fresh=%s age=%s score=%s counts=%s(%s/%s) mana=%s(%s) parse=%s<reset>", confidence, _fmt_bool(snap.fresh), _fmt_secs(age), score_text, _fmt_bool(snap.had_counts), counts_left, counts_right, _fmt_bool(snap.had_mana), mana_pct, _fmt_bool(parse_open) ))
_ce(string.format("<dim_grey>[RA] defs blind=%s deaf=%s speed=%s shield=%s cloak=%s kola=%s levitation=%s caloric=%s frost=%s insomnia=%s<reset>", _fmt_bool(snap.blind), _fmt_bool(snap.deaf), _fmt_bool(snap.speed), _fmt_bool(snap.shield), _fmt_bool(snap.cloak), _fmt_bool(snap.kola), _fmt_bool(snap.levitation), _fmt_bool(snap.caloric), _fmt_bool(snap.frost), _fmt_bool(snap.insomnia) ))
_ce(string.format("<dim_grey>[RA] missing=%s txn=%s active=%s window=%s read_id=%s<reset>", _fmt_list(snap.missing_keys), tostring(txn.status or snap.txn_status or ""), _fmt_bool(txn.active), _fmt_secs(txn.window_remaining or snap.parse_window_remaining), tostring(snap.txn_read_id or snap.read_id or txn.read_id or "?") ))
if type(plan) == "table" then _ce(string.format("<dim_grey>[RA] route needs_readaura=%s mana_ready=%s cleanseaura_ready=%s bm=%s<reset>", _fmt_bool(plan.needs_readaura), _fmt_bool(plan.mana_ready), _fmt_bool(plan.cleanseaura_ready), tostring(plan.bm_snapshot_state or "") )) end
return true end
function D.ensure_gmcp() gmcp = gmcp or {} gmcp.Char = gmcp.Char or {} gmcp.Char.Vitals = gmcp.Char.Vitals or {} local v = gmcp.Char.Vitals
-- Ensure entity presence is detectable for ent_ready(). if type(v.charstats) ~= "table" then v.charstats = { "Entity: Yes" } end local found = false for _, s in ipairs(v.charstats) do if tostring(s):lower():find("entity:%s*yes") then found = true; break end end if not found then table.insert(v.charstats, "Entity: Yes") end
-- Defaults (only if absent) if v.eq == nil and v.equilibrium == nil then v.eq = "1" end if v.bal == nil and v.balance == nil then v.bal = "1" end return v end
local function _eq_now() local v = D.ensure_gmcp() return tostring(v.eq or v.equilibrium or "") == "1" or (v.eq == true or v.equilibrium == true) end local function _bal_now() local v = D.ensure_gmcp() return tostring(v.bal or v.balance or "") == "1" or (v.bal == true or v.balance == true) end local function _ent_now() if Yso and Yso.state and type(Yso.state.ent_ready) == "function" then local ok,v = pcall(Yso.state.ent_ready) if ok then return v == true end end return true end
function D.set_eq(ready, src) local v = D.ensure_gmcp() local b = (ready == true) v.eq = b and "1" or "0" v.equilibrium = v.eq if b and Yso and Yso.pulse and type(Yso.pulse.wake) == "function" then pcall(Yso.pulse.wake, "lane:eq") end if D.cfg.echo then _ce(string.format("<cadet_blue>[MagiDevtools]<reset> EQ = %s", b and "READY" or "DOWN")) end end
function D.set_bal(ready, src) local v = D.ensure_gmcp() local b = (ready == true) v.bal = b and "1" or "0" v.balance = v.bal if b and Yso and Yso.pulse and type(Yso.pulse.wake) == "function" then pcall(Yso.pulse.wake, "lane:bal") end if D.cfg.echo then _ce(string.format("<cadet_blue>[MagiDevtools]<reset> BAL = %s", b and "READY" or "DOWN")) end end
function D.set_ent(ready, src) D.ensure_gmcp() local b = (ready == true) if Yso and Yso.state and type(Yso.state.set_ent_ready) == "function" then pcall(Yso.state.set_ent_ready, b, src or "devtools") elseif Yso and Yso.occ then Yso.occ.entity_ready = b end if D.cfg.echo then _ce(string.format("<cadet_blue>[MagiDevtools]<reset> ENT = %s", b and "READY" or "DOWN")) end end
function D.set_dry(on) Yso.net = Yso.net or {} Yso.net.cfg = Yso.net.cfg or {} local b = (on == true) Yso.net.cfg.dry_run = b if D.cfg.echo then _ce(string.format("<cadet_blue>[MagiDevtools]<reset> DRY = %s", b and "ON" or "OFF")) end return b end
function D.status() D.ensure_gmcp()
local eq = _eq_now() if Yso and Yso.state and type(Yso.state.eq_ready) == "function" then local ok,v = pcall(Yso.state.eq_ready); if ok then eq = (v == true) end end
local bal = _bal_now() if Yso and Yso.state and type(Yso.state.bal_ready) == "function" then local ok,v = pcall(Yso.state.bal_ready); if ok then bal = (v == true) end end
local ent = _ent_now()
local dry = (Yso and Yso.net and Yso.net.cfg and Yso.net.cfg.dry_run == true) and "ON" or "OFF" local mode = (Yso and Yso.cfg and Yso.cfg.payload_mode) or "as_available" local prefer = (Yso and Yso.cfg and Yso.cfg.emit_prefer) or "eq" local sep = (Yso and Yso.net and type(Yso.net.get_sep)=="function") and Yso.net.get_sep() or ((Yso and Yso.cfg and Yso.cfg.pipe_sep) or "&&")
_ce(string.format("<cadet_blue>[MagiDevtools]<reset> EQ:%s BAL:%s ENT:%s DRY:%s MODE:%s PREFER:%s SEP:%s", eq and "READY" or "DOWN", bal and "READY" or "DOWN", ent and "READY" or "DOWN", dry, tostring(mode), tostring(prefer), tostring(sep) ))
if Yso and Yso.queue and Yso.queue._staged then local st = Yso.queue._staged local free_n = (type(st.free)=="table") and #st.free or 0 local eq_s = st.eq and _trim(st.eq) or "" local bal_s = st.bal and _trim(st.bal) or "" local cl_s = st.class and _trim(st.class) or "" _ce(string.format("<dim_grey>[MagiDevtools] staged free=%d eq=%s bal=%s class=%s<reset>", free_n, (eq_s~="" and "Y" or "-"), (bal_s~="" and "Y" or "-"), (cl_s~="" and "Y" or "-") )) end end
function D.lane(lane, tok) lane = _lane_key(lane) local b = _boolish(tok) if b == "toggle" or b == nil then if lane == "eq" then b = not _eq_now() elseif lane == "bal" then b = not _bal_now() elseif lane == "class" then b = not _ent_now() else b = true end end if lane == "eq" then return D.set_eq(b, "devtools:lane") elseif lane == "bal" then return D.set_bal(b, "devtools:lane") elseif lane == "class" then return D.set_ent(b, "devtools:lane") else if D.cfg.echo then _ce("<red>[MagiDevtools]<reset> unknown lane: "..tostring(lane)) end end end
function D.stage(lane, cmd) lane = _lane_key(lane) cmd = _trim(cmd) if cmd == "" then return false end if not (Yso and Yso.queue and type(Yso.queue.stage) == "function") then _ce("<red>[MagiDevtools]<reset> Yso.queue.stage not available.") return false end pcall(Yso.queue.stage, lane, cmd, { src = "devtools:stage" }) if D.cfg.echo then _ce(string.format("<dim_grey>[MagiDevtools] stage %s: %s<reset>", lane, cmd)) end return true end
function D.commit(lane) if not (Yso and Yso.queue and type(Yso.queue.commit) == "function") then _ce("<red>[MagiDevtools]<reset> Yso.queue.commit not available.") return false end local opts = {} lane = _lane_key(lane or "") if lane == "eq" or lane == "bal" or lane == "class" then opts.wake_lane = lane end local ok,res = pcall(Yso.queue.commit, opts) local sent = (ok and res == true) or false if D.cfg.echo then _ce(string.format("<dim_grey>[MagiDevtools] commit%s => %s<reset>", (opts.wake_lane and (" lane:"..opts.wake_lane) or ""), sent and "SENT" or "NOOP")) end return sent end
function D.clear(lane) if Yso and Yso.queue and type(Yso.queue.clear) == "function" then pcall(Yso.queue.clear, lane) if D.cfg.echo then _ce("<dim_grey>[MagiDevtools] cleared "..(lane or "ALL").."<reset>") end return true end return false end
function D.set_mode(mode) mode = _trim(mode):lower() if mode == "freestyle" then mode = "as_available" end if mode == "combo" then mode = "paired" end if mode ~= "paired" and mode ~= "as_available" then _ce("<red>[MagiDevtools]<reset> mode must be paired|as_available") return false end Yso.cfg = Yso.cfg or {} Yso.cfg.payload_mode = mode if D.cfg.echo then _ce("<cadet_blue>[MagiDevtools]<reset> MODE = "..mode) end return true end
function D.set_prefer(p) p = _trim(p):lower() if p ~= "eq" and p ~= "bal" then _ce("<red>[MagiDevtools]<reset> prefer must be eq|bal") return false end Yso.cfg = Yso.cfg or {} Yso.cfg.emit_prefer = p if D.cfg.echo then _ce("<cadet_blue>[MagiDevtools]<reset> PREFER = "..p) end return true end
function D.ack(kind) kind = _trim(kind):lower() if not (Yso and Yso.pulse and type(Yso.pulse.entity_ack) == "function") then _ce("<red>[MagiDevtools]<reset> Yso.pulse.entity_ack not available.") return false end if kind == "" then kind = "fail" end if kind == "disregard" then kind = "fail" end pcall(Yso.pulse.entity_ack, kind, "devtools") if D.cfg.echo then _ce("<dim_grey>[MagiDevtools] entity_ack "..kind.."<reset>") end return true end
function D.reset() D.ensure_gmcp() D.set_dry(true) D.set_eq(true) D.set_bal(true) D.set_ent(true) D.clear() D.status() end
--========================================================-- -- MagiDevtools: ytest (debug harness) -- • Lives in MagiDevtools only (no core Yso changes). -- • Purpose: reproducible, short commands for testing EQ/BAL/ENT output -- and capturing server feedback without fragile command-line Lua pastes. -- -- Usage: -- ytest snap -- ytest sens [secs] [force] -- ytest instill <aff> [secs] [force] -- ytest ent <raw command...> [secs] -- ytest bloodboil snap|fire [secs] [force]|debug [on|off|toggle]|auto [on|off|toggle] -- ytest off --========================================================--
D.test = D.test or { _trigs = {}, _timers = {} }
local function _tprint(msg) msg = tostring(msg or "") _ce("[ytest] "..msg) end
local function _kill_trig(id) if id then pcall(killTrigger, id) end end local function _kill_timer(id) if id then pcall(killTimer, id) end end
function D.test.off() for k,id in pairs(D.test._trigs) do _kill_trig(id); D.test._trigs[k] = nil end for k,id in pairs(D.test._timers) do _kill_timer(id); D.test._timers[k] = nil end end
function D.test.get_target() local t = "" if Yso and type(Yso.get_target) == "function" then local ok,res = pcall(Yso.get_target) if ok and type(res) == "string" then t = res end end if t == "" and Yso and type(Yso.targeting) == "table" then local T = Yso.targeting if type(T.get) == "function" then local ok,res = pcall(T.get); if ok and type(res) == "string" then t = res end end if t == "" and type(T.get_target) == "function" then local ok,res = pcall(T.get_target); if ok and type(res) == "string" then t = res end end if t == "" and type(T.target) == "string" then t = T.target end end if t == "" then t = tostring(rawget(_G, "target") or "") end return _trim(t) end
local function _arm_common_triggers(mode) D.test._trigs.any = tempRegexTrigger("(?i)(gesture|disrupt|aura|affliction|equilibrium|mana|no one by that name|do not know how|may not do that|huh\\?|disregard your order|may command another entity|so soon)", function() _tprint(line or "") end)
if mode == "instill" then D.test._trigs.ok = tempRegexTrigger("^You make a sharp gesture toward (.+), disrupting", function() _tprint("OK -> "..tostring(matches[2] or "")) end)
D.test._trigs.fail = tempRegexTrigger("(?i)^(You must regain equilibrium|You do not have enough mana|You see no one by that name|You do not know how|You may not do that|Huh\\?)", function() _tprint("FAIL -> "..tostring(line or "")) end) elseif mode == "ent" then D.test._trigs.dis = tempRegexTrigger("(?i)disregards your order", function() _tprint("ENT FAIL -> "..tostring(line or "")) end) D.test._trigs.ready = tempRegexTrigger("^You may command another entity", function() _tprint("ENT READY -> "..tostring(line or "")) end) D.test._trigs.toosoon = tempRegexTrigger("(?i)may not command another entity so soon", function() _tprint("ENT TOO SOON -> "..tostring(line or "")) end) end end
local function _auto_off(secs) secs = tonumber(secs) or 12 if secs < 1 then secs = 1 end D.test._timers.auto = tempTimer(secs, function() D.test.off() _tprint("auto-OFF") end) end
function D.test.instill(aff, secs, force) aff = _trim(aff) if aff == "" then _tprint("usage: ytest instill <aff> [secs] [force]"); return end D.test.off() _arm_common_triggers("instill")
local t = D.test.get_target() local eq = _eq_now() _tprint(string.format("eq=%s target=%s aff=%s", eq and "1" or "0", (t ~= "" and t or "<none>"), aff))
if t == "" then _tprint("no target; not sending") elseif (not force) and (not eq) then _tprint("EQ down; not sending (add 'force' to override)") else send(string.format("instill %s with %s", t, aff)) _tprint("sent: instill "..t.." with "..aff) end
_auto_off(secs) end
function D.test.ent(cmd, secs) cmd = _trim(cmd) if cmd == "" then _tprint("usage: ytest ent <raw command...> [secs]"); return end D.test.off() _arm_common_triggers("ent") _tprint("ent_ready="..tostring(_ent_now() and "1" or "0")) send(cmd) _tprint("sent: "..cmd) _auto_off(secs) end
function D.test.snap() D.status() _tprint("target="..tostring(D.test.get_target())) end
local function _self_aff_list() local A = (Legacy and Legacy.Curing and Legacy.Curing.Affs) or {} local out = {} for aff, present in pairs(A) do if present == true and aff ~= "softlocked" and aff ~= "truelocked" then out[#out + 1] = tostring(aff) end end table.sort(out) return out end
local function _self_has_aff(aff) local A = (Legacy and Legacy.Curing and Legacy.Curing.Affs) or {} return A[tostring(aff or "")] == true end
local function _current_class_name() local cls = "" if Yso and Yso.classinfo and type(Yso.classinfo.get) == "function" then local ok, res = pcall(Yso.classinfo.get) if ok and type(res) == "string" then cls = _trim(res) end end if cls == "" and gmcp and gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Status then cls = _trim(gmcp.Char.Status.class or gmcp.Char.Status.classname) end if cls == "" and type(Yso and Yso.class) == "string" then cls = _trim(Yso.class) end return cls end
local function _current_cureset_name() local set = Legacy and Legacy.Curing and Legacy.Curing.ActiveServerSet if type(set) == "string" and _trim(set) ~= "" then return _trim(set):lower() end
local prof = Yso and Yso.curing and Yso.curing._active_profile if type(prof) == "string" and _trim(prof) ~= "" then return _trim(prof):lower() end
local cur = rawget(_G, "CurrentCureset") if type(cur) == "string" and _trim(cur) ~= "" then return _trim(cur):lower() end
return "" end
local function _bloodboil_mod() return Yso and Yso.magi and Yso.magi.elemental or nil end
local function _bloodboil_res_value(element) local R = Yso and Yso.magi and Yso.magi.resonance or nil if type(R) == "table" and type(R.get) == "function" then local ok, val = pcall(R.get, element) if ok and tonumber(val) then return tonumber(val) or 0 end end if type(R) == "table" and type(R.state) == "table" then return tonumber(R.state[element] or 0) or 0 end return 0 end
local function _bloodboil_res_label(level) level = tonumber(level) or 0 if level >= 3 then return "major" end if level >= 2 then return "moderate" end if level >= 1 then return "minor" end return "none" end
local function _bloodboil_reason_text(reason, count, min_affs) reason = tostring(reason or "?") if reason == "ok" then return string.format("ok affs=%d/%d", tonumber(count or 0) or 0, tonumber(min_affs or 0) or 0) end if reason == "affs" then return string.format("affs=%d/<%d", tonumber(count or 0) or 0, tonumber(min_affs or 0) or 0) end return reason end
function D.test.bloodboil_snap() local M = _bloodboil_mod() if type(M) ~= "table" then _tprint("bloodboil module not loaded.") return false end
local ready, reason, count, min_affs = false, "unknown", nil, nil if type(M.should_bloodboil) == "function" then local ok, a, b, c, d = pcall(M.should_bloodboil) if ok then ready, reason, count, min_affs = (a == true), b, c, d else reason = "error:" .. tostring(a) end end
local now = _now_s() local cd_left = (tonumber(M.state and M.state.cooldown_until or 0) or 0) - now if cd_left < 0 then cd_left = 0 end
local class_name = _current_class_name() local cureset = _current_cureset_name() local affs = _self_aff_list() local fire = _bloodboil_res_value("fire") local water = _bloodboil_res_value("water")
_tprint(string.format( "bloodboil ready=%s reason=%s class=%s cureset=%s eq=%s auto=%s debug=%s cd=%s fire=%s(%d) water=%s(%d) dual_major=%s", ready and "Y" or "N", _bloodboil_reason_text(reason, count, min_affs), (class_name ~= "" and class_name or "?"), (cureset ~= "" and cureset or "?"), _fmt_bool(_eq_now()), _fmt_bool(M.cfg and M.cfg.auto_bloodboil == true), _fmt_bool(M.cfg and M.cfg.debug == true), _fmt_secs(cd_left), _bloodboil_res_label(fire), fire, _bloodboil_res_label(water), water, _fmt_bool(fire >= 3 and water >= 3) )) _tprint(string.format("self affs=%d haemophilia=%s", #affs, _fmt_bool(_self_has_aff("haemophilia")))) if #affs > 0 then _tprint("self aff list=" .. table.concat(affs, ", ")) end
local pvp = M.cfg and M.cfg.pvp if type(pvp) == "table" then local pvp_entry = type(pvp.curesets) == "table" and pvp.curesets[cureset:lower()] or nil local pvp_min = (type(pvp_entry) == "table" and tonumber(pvp_entry.min_affs)) or tonumber(pvp.min_affs_default or 3) or 3 _tprint(string.format("pvp enabled=%s cureset_min=%d default_min=%d lock_override=%s", _fmt_bool(pvp.enabled == true), pvp_min, tonumber(pvp.min_affs_default or 3) or 3, _fmt_bool(pvp.allow_lock_override == true) )) end
return ready end
function D.test.selfcleanse_snap() local cureset = _current_cureset_name() local class_name = _current_class_name() local affs = _self_aff_list()
_tprint("=== Self-Cleanse Snapshot ===") _tprint(string.format("class=%s cureset=%s affs=%d", class_name, cureset, #affs)) if #affs > 0 then _tprint("aff list=" .. table.concat(affs, ", ")) end
_tprint("--- Bloodboil (Magi) ---") local M = _bloodboil_mod() if type(M) == "table" and type(M.should_bloodboil) == "function" then local ok, a, b, c, d = pcall(M.should_bloodboil) if ok then _tprint(string.format(" ready=%s reason=%s affs=%s/%s", (a == true) and "Y" or "N", tostring(b), tostring(c or "?"), tostring(d or "?"))) else _tprint(" error: " .. tostring(a)) end else _tprint(" not loaded") end
_tprint("--- Fool (Occultist) ---") local F = Yso and Yso.fool if type(F) == "table" and type(F.status) == "function" then pcall(F.status) else _tprint(" not loaded") end
_tprint("--- Tree Tattoo ---") local T = Yso and Yso.tree if type(T) == "table" and type(T.status) == "function" then pcall(T.status) else _tprint(" not loaded") end end
local function _arm_bloodboil_triggers() D.test._trigs.bb_any = tempRegexTrigger( "(?i)(boil your blood|haemophilia|equilibrium|mana|may not do that|huh\\?|once again)", function() _tprint("bloodboil -> " .. tostring(line or "")) end ) end
local function _queue_bloodboil_force(M) local cfg = type(M.cfg) == "table" and M.cfg or {} local cmd = tostring(cfg.command or "cast bloodboil") local mode = tostring(cfg.queue_mode or "prepend") local qtype = tostring(cfg.queue_type or "eq")
if Yso and Yso.queue and type(Yso.queue.raw) == "function" then local ok, queued = pcall(Yso.queue.raw, mode, qtype, cmd) if ok and queued == true then return true, string.format("queue raw %s/%s", mode, qtype) end end
if type(send) == "function" then send(string.format("queue %s %s %s", mode, qtype, cmd), false) return true, string.format("queue %s %s", mode, qtype) end
return false, "send unavailable" end
function D.test.bloodboil_fire(secs, force) local M = _bloodboil_mod() if type(M) ~= "table" then _tprint("bloodboil module not loaded.") return false end
D.test.off() _arm_bloodboil_triggers() D.test.bloodboil_snap()
local used = false if force == true then local ok, via = _queue_bloodboil_force(M) used = ok == true if used then if type(M.set_ready) == "function" then pcall(M.set_ready, false, "ytest:force") end M.state = M.state or {} M.state.last_attempt = _now_s() _tprint("queued bloodboil via force (" .. tostring(via) .. ")") else _tprint("bloodboil force queue failed.") end elseif type(M.try_bloodboil) == "function" then local ok, queued = pcall(M.try_bloodboil, "ytest") if ok and queued == true then used = true _tprint("queued bloodboil via live helper.") elseif ok then _tprint("bloodboil not queued; see snapshot reason above.") else _tprint("bloodboil error: " .. tostring(queued)) end else _tprint("bloodboil helper missing try_bloodboil().") end
_auto_off(secs) return used end
function D.test.bloodboil_debug(tok) local M = _bloodboil_mod() if type(M) ~= "table" then _tprint("bloodboil module not loaded.") return false end
M.cfg = M.cfg or {} local desired = _boolish(tok) if desired == nil or desired == "toggle" then desired = not (M.cfg.debug == true) end M.cfg.debug = (desired == true) _tprint("bloodboil debug = " .. (M.cfg.debug and "ON" or "OFF")) return M.cfg.debug end
function D.test.bloodboil_auto(tok) local M = _bloodboil_mod() if type(M) ~= "table" then _tprint("bloodboil module not loaded.") return false end
M.cfg = M.cfg or {} local desired = _boolish(tok) if desired == nil or desired == "toggle" then desired = not (M.cfg.auto_bloodboil == true) end M.cfg.auto_bloodboil = (desired == true) _tprint("bloodboil auto = " .. (M.cfg.auto_bloodboil and "ON" or "OFF")) return M.cfg.auto_bloodboil end
function D.test.run(argstr) argstr = _trim(argstr) if argstr == "" then _tprint("usage: ytest snap | ytest sens [secs] [force] | ytest instill <aff> [secs] [force] | ytest ent <raw cmd...> [secs] | ytest bloodboil snap|fire [secs] [force]|debug [on|off|toggle]|auto [on|off|toggle] | ytest off") return end
local toks = {} for w in argstr:gmatch("%S+") do table.insert(toks, w) end local sub = tostring(toks[1] or ""):lower()
if sub == "off" then D.test.off(); _tprint("OFF"); return elseif sub == "snap" then D.test.snap(); return elseif sub == "sens" or sub == "sensitivity" then local secs, force = nil, false for i = 2, #toks do local x = tostring(toks[i]):lower() if x == "force" then force = true elseif (not secs) and tonumber(x) then secs = tonumber(x) end end D.test.instill("sensitivity", secs or 12, force) return elseif sub == "instill" then local aff = toks[2] or "" local secs, force = nil, false for i = 3, #toks do local x = tostring(toks[i]):lower() if x == "force" then force = true elseif (not secs) and tonumber(x) then secs = tonumber(x) end end D.test.instill(aff, secs or 12, force) return elseif sub == "ent" or sub == "entity" then local secs = nil if #toks >= 3 and tonumber(toks[#toks]) then secs = tonumber(toks[#toks]) end local last = (#toks >= 3 and secs) and (#toks - 1) or #toks local cmd = table.concat(toks, " ", 2, last) D.test.ent(cmd, secs or 12) return elseif sub == "bloodboil" or sub == "bb" then local action = tostring(toks[2] or "snap"):lower() if action == "snap" or action == "status" then D.test.bloodboil_snap() return elseif action == "fire" or action == "try" then local secs, force = nil, false for i = 3, #toks do local x = tostring(toks[i]):lower() if x == "force" then force = true elseif (not secs) and tonumber(x) then secs = tonumber(x) end end D.test.bloodboil_fire(secs or 12, force) return elseif action == "debug" then D.test.bloodboil_debug(toks[3] or "toggle") return elseif action == "auto" then D.test.bloodboil_auto(toks[3] or "toggle") return end _tprint("usage: ytest bloodboil snap|fire [secs] [force]|debug [on|off|toggle]|auto [on|off|toggle]") return elseif sub == "selfcleanse" or sub == "sc" then D.test.selfcleanse_snap() return elseif sub == "tree" then local T = Yso and Yso.tree if type(T) == "table" and type(T.status) == "function" then pcall(T.status) else _tprint("tree module not loaded.") end return elseif sub == "fool" then local F = Yso and Yso.fool if type(F) == "table" and type(F.status) == "function" then pcall(F.status) else _tprint("fool module not loaded.") end return end
_tprint("unknown subcommand: "..sub) end
-- optional load default; keep DRY off unless explicitly requested if D.cfg.auto_dry == true and not (Yso and Yso.net and Yso.net.cfg and Yso.net.cfg.dry_run ~= nil) then D.ensure_gmcp() D.set_dry(true) end

Script.name: Route Debug Helpers
Script.script:
-- Route-aware debug helpers for MagiDevtools. -- Provides yrdebug, yrshow aliases.
Yso = Yso or {} Yso.devtools = Yso.devtools or {} local D = Yso.devtools D.route_debug = D.route_debug or {} local RD = D.route_debug
RD.routes = { aff = function() return Yso.off and Yso.off.oc and Yso.off.oc.occ_aff_burst end, dam = function() local off = Yso and Yso.off or nil if Yso and type(Yso.is_magi) == "function" then local ok, is_magi = pcall(Yso.is_magi) if ok and is_magi == true then return off and off.magi and (off.magi.group_damage or off.magi.dmg) end end return off and off.oc and off.oc.group_damage end, par = function() return Yso.off and Yso.off.oc and Yso.off.oc.party_aff end, focus = function() return Yso.off and Yso.off.magi and Yso.off.magi.focus end, } RD.aliases = RD.aliases or {}
local function _tprint(msg) if type(cecho) == "function" then cecho(string.format("<CadetBlue>[MagiDevtools:Route]<reset> %s\n", tostring(msg))) end end
local function _route_mod(name) name = tostring(name or ""):lower() local getter = RD.routes[name] if type(getter) == "function" then return getter() end return nil end
local function _route_state(name) local mod = _route_mod(name) if not mod then return nil end return type(mod.state) == "table" and mod.state or nil end
local function _route_explain(name) local mod = _route_mod(name) if not mod then return nil end if type(mod.explain) == "function" then local ok, ex = pcall(mod.explain) if ok then return ex end end return nil end
function RD.debug_toggle(route, on_off) route = tostring(route or ""):lower() if route == "" or route == "on" or route == "off" then _tprint("usage: yrdebug [on|off] [aff|dam|par|focus]") return end local mod = _route_mod(route) if not mod then _tprint("unknown route: " .. route) return end
on_off = tostring(on_off or ""):lower() local desired = nil if on_off == "on" or on_off == "1" then desired = true elseif on_off == "off" or on_off == "0" then desired = false end
local dbg = type(mod.debug) == "table" and mod.debug or nil local st = type(mod.state) == "table" and mod.state or nil
if type(mod.toggle_debug_screen) == "function" then local ok = pcall(mod.toggle_debug_screen, desired) if ok then local current = (dbg and dbg.enabled == true) or (st and st.debug == true) or false _tprint(route .. " debug = " .. tostring(current)) return end end
if dbg then if desired == nil then dbg.enabled = not (dbg.enabled == true) else dbg.enabled = desired end if dbg.enabled == true and type(mod.show_debug_screen) == "function" then pcall(mod.show_debug_screen) end _tprint(route .. " debug = " .. tostring(dbg.enabled == true)) return end
if not st then _tprint(route .. " has no state table") return end if desired == nil then st.debug = not (st.debug == true) else st.debug = desired end _tprint(route .. " debug = " .. tostring(st.debug == true)) end
function RD.show(route) local args = tostring(route or ""):lower() local toks = {} for w in args:gmatch("%S+") do toks[#toks + 1] = w end local name = toks[1] or "" local full = false for i = 2, #toks do if toks[i] == "full" then full = true end end
if name == "" then RD.show("aff") RD.show("dam") RD.show("par") RD.show("focus") return end
local mod = _route_mod(name) local ex = _route_explain(name) if not ex then local st = _route_state(name) if st then _tprint(name .. " state.enabled=" .. tostring(st.enabled) .. " loop=" .. tostring(st.loop_enabled)) else _tprint(name .. ": no data") end return end local function _b(v) return (v == true) and "Y" or "N" end local function _s(v) if v == nil then return "-" end local t = tostring(v) return (t == "" and "-") or t end local function _rejects(v) if type(v) ~= "table" or #v == 0 then return "-" end local out = {} for i = 1, #v do local row = v[i] if type(row) == "table" then out[#out + 1] = string.format("%s:%s", _s(row.decision), _s(row.reason)) end end return (#out > 0) and table.concat(out, ", ") or "-" end
local planned = type(ex.planned) == "table" and ex.planned or {} local finish = type(ex.finish_transition) == "table" and ex.finish_transition or {} local para = type(ex.para) == "table" and ex.para or {} local bm = type(ex.bm_snapshot) == "table" and ex.bm_snapshot or {} local waiting = type(ex.waiting) == "table" and ex.waiting or {} local debug_enabled = ((type(mod) == "table" and type(mod.debug) == "table" and mod.debug.enabled == true) or ex.debug == true)
_tprint(string.format("%s | target=%s active=%s debug=%s", name, _s(ex.target), _b(ex.route_enabled == true or ex.active == true), _b(debug_enabled))) _tprint(string.format(" plan | eq=%s class=%s bal=%s free=%s", _s(planned.eq), _s(planned.class), _s(planned.bal), _s(planned.free)))
if name == "aff" then _tprint(string.format(" aff | stage=%s next=%s blocker=%s focus=%s mana=%s", _s(finish.stage), _s(finish.next_action), _s(finish.blocker), _s(ex.focus_lock_count), _s(ex.mana_pct))) _tprint(string.format(" wait | active=%s lane=%s age=%.2f q=%s", _b(waiting.active == true), _s(waiting.main_lane), tonumber(waiting.age or 0) or 0, _s(waiting.queue))) _tprint(string.format(" para | allow=%s lane=%s cure=%s p=%.2f why=%s", _b(para.allowed == true), _s(para.lane), _s(para.predicted_next_cure), tonumber(para.confidence or 0) or 0, _s(para.block_reason))) _tprint(string.format(" bm | state=%s branch=%s/%s passive=%s", _s(bm.state), _b(ex.bm_branch_active == true), _b(ex.bm_branch_provisional == true), _b(bm.passive_allowed == true))) elseif name == "dam" then local st = type(ex.state) == "table" and ex.state or {} local raw = type(st.raw) == "table" and st.raw or {} local pend = type(st.pending) == "table" and st.pending or {} _tprint(string.format(" dam | stage=%s decision=%s freeze=%s fire=%s why=%s", _s(ex.branch_stage), _s(ex.decision), _b(ex.freeze_step_done == true), _b(ex.fire_branch_eligible == true), _s(ex.reason or ex.last_reason))) _tprint(string.format(" aff | wb=%s frozen=%s frostbite=%s scalded=%s confl=%s aflame=%s", _b(st.waterbonds == true), _b(st.frozen == true), _b(st.frostbite == true), _b(st.scalded == true), _b(st.conflagrate == true), _s(raw.aflame))) _tprint(string.format(" res | water=%s(%s) fire=%s(%s) pend h/f/m=%s/%s/%s", _s(st.water_res), _b(st.water_res_major == true), _s(st.fire_res), _b(st.fire_res_major == true), _b(pend.horripilation == true), _b(pend.freeze == true), _b(pend.magma == true))) elseif name == "par" then _tprint(string.format(" par | need=%s mana=%s lock=%s", _s(ex.need_aff), _s(ex.mana_pct), _b(ex.lock_ready == true))) elseif name == "focus" then local st = type(ex.state) == "table" and ex.state or {} local res = type(ex.resonance) == "table" and ex.resonance or {} local diss = type(ex.dissonance) == "table" and ex.dissonance or {} local pressure = type(ex.pressure) == "table" and ex.pressure or {} local fulm = type(ex.fulminate) == "table" and ex.fulminate or {} local conv = type(ex.convergence) == "table" and ex.convergence or {} local destroy = type(ex.destroy) == "table" and ex.destroy or {} _tprint(string.format(" focus | active=%s postconv=%s stage=%s decision=%s", _b(ex.active == true), _b(ex.postconv == true), _s(ex.stage), _s(ex.decision))) _tprint(string.format(" why | reason=%s blocker=%s", _s(ex.reason), _s(ex.blocker))) _tprint(string.format(" res | air=%s earth=%s fire=%s water=%s miss=%s", _s(res.air), _s(res.earth), _s(res.fire), _s(res.water), _s(res.missing_moderate))) _tprint(string.format(" diss | stage=%s conf=%s evidence=%s", _s(diss.stage), _s(diss.confidence), _s(diss.last_evidence))) _tprint(string.format(" press| kelp=%s rule=%s", _s(pressure.kelpscore), _s(pressure.threshold_rule))) _tprint(string.format(" fulm | focus=%s epilepsy=%s para_conv=%s", _b(fulm.focus_punish_armed == true), _b(fulm.epilepsy_live == true), _b(fulm.para_conversion_ready == true))) _tprint(string.format(" conv | ready=%s blocker=%s next=%s", _b(conv.conv_ready == true), _s(conv.conv_blocker), _s(conv.next_gate))) _tprint(string.format(" dest | ready=%s blocker=%s confl=%s hp=%s", _b(destroy.destroy_ready == true), _s(destroy.destroy_blocker), _b(destroy.conflagration == true), _s(destroy.hp_window))) _tprint(string.format(" rej | chosen=%s rejects=%s", _s(ex.decision), _rejects(ex.rejects))) if full then local pending = type(ex.pending) == "table" and ex.pending or {} _tprint(string.format(" full | phase=%s subphase=%s bucket=%s target=%s", _s(ex.phase), _s(ex.subphase), _s(ex.bucket), _s(ex.target))) _tprint(string.format(" gate | threshold=%s next=%s conv_blocker=%s destroy_blocker=%s", _s(ex.threshold_rule), _s(conv.next_gate), _s(conv.conv_blocker), _s(destroy.destroy_blocker))) _tprint(string.format(" pend | horr=%s freeze=%s bomb=%s fulm=%s diss=%s conv=%s dest=%s", _b(pending.horripilation == true), _b(pending.freeze == true), _b(pending.bombard == true), _b(pending.fulminate == true), _b(pending.dissonance == true), _b(pending.convergence == true), _b(pending.destroy == true))) _tprint(string.format(" last | cmd=%s sent=%s last_reason=%s", _s(ex.last_cmd), _s(ex.last_sent_cmd), _s(ex.last_reason))) if type(st.route) == "table" then _tprint(string.format(" flow | route_phase=%s/%s/%s postconv=%s", _s(st.route.phase), _s(st.route.subphase), _s(st.route.bucket), _b(st.route.postconv == true))) end end end end
